name: @tootallnate/square-wd
description: Parser for Square's '.WD' wave-bank format. Used by Final Fantasy XI/X/X-2/Crystal Chronicles to ship hundreds of sound effects + voice samples in a single container. Each bank's entries decode to PS-ADPCM (PS2/PSP/Vita) or DSP-ADPCM (GameCube); produces ready-to-play 16-bit PCM samples or wraps them as WAV blobs.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
